FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about Aashu Choudhary's financial services.

Who is Aashu Choudhary?
▾
Aashu Choudhary is a Bangalore-based financial compliance expert and founder of Incomiq. With deep expertise in income tax, GST, EPFO, TDS, corporate compliance and investment advisory, Aashu has helped 5000+ individuals, startups and MSMEs across India manage their finances with confidence.
What services does Aashu Choudhary offer?
▾
Aashu Choudhary provides income tax filing, GST registration & returns, EPFO compliance, TDS management, trademark registration, company & ROC compliance, LLP compliance, investment advisory, and web development services — all under one trusted platform.
What is EPFO Compliance and why is it important?
▾
EPFO (Employees' Provident Fund Organisation) compliance includes timely PF registration, monthly ECR filing, PF challan payments, and handling employee PF transfers & withdrawals. Non-compliance can attract heavy penalties. Aashu Choudhary's team ensures 100% timely and accurate EPFO filings for all types of employers.
Are the free financial tools really free?
▾
Yes — 100% free, forever! Tax calculator, balance sheet generator, P&L generator and the live paper trading investment platform are all available at no cost at aashuchoudhary.info. No signup required, no hidden charges.
How can I contact Aashu Choudhary?
▾
Call +91 88253 72532 (Mon–Sat, 9 AM–7 PM), email Support.incomiq@gmail.com, or WhatsApp directly for the fastest response. You can also visit aashuchoudhary.info for all services and free tools.

Financial & Compliance Services
by Aashu Choudhary

🧾 Tax

Income Tax Filing & Taxation

Accurate ITR filing for individuals, HUFs, businesses & NRIs. Maximize refunds and stay 100% compliant with zero stress.

📑 GST

GST Registration & Returns

End-to-end GST registration, GSTR-1, GSTR-3B, GSTR-9 filing and reconciliation for smooth business operations.

💼 TDS

TDS Compliance

Timely TDS deduction, deposit & return filing (24Q, 26Q, 27Q). Avoid penalties with expert TDS management by Aashu Choudhary.

🏛️ EPFO

EPFO Compliance

Complete PF registration, monthly ECR filing, PF challan payments, employee PF transfers, withdrawals & full EPFO compliance management.

™️ Brand

Trademark Registration

Protect your brand identity with trademark filing, objection handling & renewal services across India.

🏢 ROC

Company & ROC Compliance

Annual filings, ROC e-forms, board minutes & complete corporate secretarial services for Pvt Ltd companies.

🤝 LLP

LLP & Partnership Compliance

LLP annual returns, Form 11 & Form 8 filing, and complete partnership firm registration & compliance.

📈 Invest

Investment Advisory

Expert investment guidance, mutual fund advisory, SIP planning & financial literacy for retail investors across India.

🖥️ Web

Web Development

Professional, SEO-optimized websites for businesses, professionals & startups with fast performance and modern design.

Founder & Financial Expert
Aashu Choudhary
Financial Compliance Expert · Bangalore, India

Aashu Choudhary is a Bangalore-based financial compliance expert who has built a reputation for making complex tax, GST, EPFO, and corporate compliance simple, accessible, and stress-free for every Indian. Founder of Incomiq, Aashu has personally helped 5000+ individuals, startups, and MSMEs across India navigate their financial obligations with confidence.

His mission: democratize financial compliance in India — so that no individual, freelancer, or small business ever has to worry about a penalty, missed filing, or compliance gap again.
